alerts: IndexNow blocked by container network policy
Site health checks blocked — not a site outage
SSH port 22 blocked at network level from cloud container (confirmed via nc, paramiko)
artonly.io HTTPS returns 403 host_not_allowed for all paths from cloud IPs
Both post JSONs are complete with correct [download:] tags in local repo
To unblock: add DREAMHOST_SSH_PASS secret to GitHub repo, then trigger Deploy ArtOnly workflow manually
action_required: Run deploy-artonly-2026-05-24.sh on DreamHost via SSH from a machine with outbound port 22 access, OR trigger the GitHub Actions workflow after adding DREAMHOST_SSH_PASS secret
